topic: Is remote work better than office work?

turns.speaker: Karthik
turns.text: Remote work saves travel time and improves work-life balance.

turns.speaker: Meena
turns.text: Office work is better for collaboration and discipline.

turns.speaker: Karthik
turns.text: No, remote work is obviously superior in almost every case.

turns.speaker: Arun
turns.text: Yesterday I saw a movie about office culture, it was very interesting.

turns.speaker: Divya
turns.text: Both models have advantages, and the best option depends on the job role and company needs.

turns.speaker: Karthik
turns.text: Still, remote work should be the default everywhere.
